subcodes.first_line: The land of mystery hath lamented, while the prison-land rejoiceth; the former weepeth at its separation from the Beloved, while the latter exulteth in pride [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ناحت ارض السر و استبشرت ارض السجن تلک تنوح لفراق المحبوب و هذه تفتخر علی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
